title: Model-Based Shared Autonomy for Robust Teleoperation
subtitle: MS Thesis — Fall 2025 – Summer 2026

content.value: For my MS thesis, my project was to develop a teleoperation system for an mobile manipulator robot.
Thank you to my advisor, Shenlong Wang, for his help and guidance through this thesis, as well as the rest of the ReasonNav team: Henry Che, Gloria Wang, and Wenzhou Ding.
